arts.ttl: VAR trial explained with impact on Newcastle United's Carabao Cup clash
arts.sum: For the first time ever in the English domestic game, crowds inside stadiums and viewers watching at home will hear referees announce final decisions after they have been advised to go to the pitchside monitor by the VAR, or upon the conclusion of factual matters checked by the VAR without an on-field review such as accidental handball by a goalscorer or offside judgements. In-stadium announcements by referees will be made following some VAR checks in this season’s Carabao Cup semi-finals, starting at the Arsenal v Newcastle tie on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Aleksander Isak £150m transfer logic as Arsenal's Mikel Arteta opens up on Newcastle United star
arts.sum: Newcastle United striker Aleksander Isak is in red-hot form ahead of the trip to Arsenal in the Carabao Cup semi-final on Tuesday. And while Eddie Howe admitted in his preview of the Arsenal game that 'the business logic is taking over from the football logic' when it comes to transfers this month, there remains no suggestion that Isak will be sold anytime soon by Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals extent of Arsenal crisis with worrying injury admission
arts.sum: Arsenal have suffered a number of injury problems this season after recently losing Bukayo Saka for two months and Mikel Arteta has been left baffled by the ongoing fitness issues his side are facing

arts.ttl: Stan Kroenke has 'extraordinary vision' as Arsenal plan to blast £500m on 80,000 Emirates expansion
Chelsea deal Newcastle United Marc Guehi January transfer bombshell after summer interest
arts.sum: Newcastle United summer transfer target Marc Guehi is wanted this month by Premier League rivals Chelsea, according to Sky Sports. Sky Sports dropped the bombshell news on Monday evening that the Stamford Bridge club want to re-sign the defender they sold for £18m as a 21-year-old.

arts.ttl: Team News: Arsenal vs. Newcastle United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's EFL Cup clash between Arsenal and Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United transfer deal 'approved' as Jorge Mendes meeting held
arts.sum: Reigning Premier League champions Manchester City are said to have held talks with agent Jorge Mendes regarding a possible move for Abdukodir Khusanov. Saudi Pro League side Al-Shabab have reportedly reached an agreement with Newcastle United to sign 35-year-old goalkeeper Dubravka.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Arsenal eye Jobe Bellingham amid gentleman’s agreement
arts.sum: Jobe Bellingham has primarily been a ball-winning midfielder for Sunderland this season, having occupied a more box-to-box role last term. Arsenal have set their sights on Sunderland's 19-year-old midfield prodigy Jobe Bellingham as they plan for a midfield overhaul in the coming transfer windows.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Nwaneri 'out for a few weeks' with injury
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta says teenage attacking midfielder Ethan Nwaneri will be "out for a few weeks" with a muscular issue.

arts.ttl: Dan Ashworth's last Newcastle United transfer suggestion to leave Man United in January
arts.sum: Dan Ashworth had an eye on Joshua Zirkzee during his ill-fated stint at Newcastle United as sporting director. Chronicle Live understands that Zirkzee was one of the names Ashworth took with him to Manchester United when he swapped St James' Park for Old Trafford earlier this year.
